input: I'd like a refund for the duplicate charge on last month's invoice.

expected.summary: Customer requests a refund for the duplicate charge on the invoice.

input: The app crashes with a 500 error whenever I upload a file.

expected.summary: The app crashes with a 500 error when uploading a file.

input: I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives.

expected.summary: Customer forgot their password and the reset email never arrives.

input: Please add dark mode, it would help a lot at night.

expected.summary: Customer asks to add dark mode for night use.

input: Just wanted to say thanks, the latest update is awesome!

expected.summary: Customer says thanks and that the latest update is awesome.

input: URGENT: production is down with a 500 error for all users, total outage.

expected.summary: Production is down with a 500 error for all users; total outage.

input: This is urgent, I'm blocked and can't work until you fix the wrong charge.

expected.summary: Customer is blocked and cannot work until the wrong charge is fixed.

input: Minor suggestion, no rush: it would be nice to have keyboard shortcuts someday.

expected.summary: A minor suggestion to add keyboard shortcuts someday.

input: Absolutely unacceptable, I've been charged twice and I'm furious!!!

expected.summary: Customer is furious about being charged twice.

input: My annual plan just renewed but I never wanted to keep it.

expected.summary: Customer's annual plan renewed but they did not want it.

input: The reports page shows a blank screen and keeps spinning after I open it.

expected.summary: The reports page shows a blank screen and keeps spinning.

input: Any plans to let us export to CSV? Right now there's no option to do it.

expected.summary: Customer asks about plans to export to CSV; there is no option today.

input: I can't get into my workspace even after the SSO redirect loops.

expected.summary: Customer cannot get into their workspace after the SSO redirect loops.

input: Your latest release is terrible, the editor keeps crashing and I lose my work.

expected.summary: The latest release keeps crashing in the editor and loses work.
